metadata.reference: G. Rosenblatt, B. Simkhovich, G. Bartal, M. Orenstein. Nonmodal plasmonics: Controlling the forced optical response of nanostructures. Phys. Rev. X 10, 011071 (2020) (See supplemental materials)
metadata.comments: 44 nm Au film. Measured using a J.A Woollam VASE ellipsometer at room temperature.
